properties.name: Internal Consistency
properties.description: The system contains no internal contradictions; it passes the self-application test (applying the system's own principles to itself does not produce a violation).
properties.operationalization: No pair (P, ¬P) is derivable from the axioms. The system does not forbid what it requires.

properties.name: Finite Axiom Set
properties.description: The system can be fully specified by a finite and enumerable set of axioms.
properties.operationalization: The axiom set has cardinality |A| < ∞, and A is decidable.

properties.name: Grounding of Liberty
properties.description: Liberty (individual property rights over body and legitimately acquired assets) is derivable from the axioms, not merely asserted.
properties.operationalization: The system has a derivation path from its foundational axioms to a liberty-affirming theorem.

properties.name: Property Rights Prior to State
properties.description: Individual property rights are recognized as existing prior to and independent of state authority.
properties.operationalization: The system does not derive property from state grant or democratic consent.

properties.name: Solution to Last-Round Problem
properties.description: The system provides a structural mechanism that prevents defection in the final period of any finitely-repeated social game.
properties.operationalization: The system contains either (a) an infinite-horizon mechanism, or (b) an epistemic mechanism making the terminal round unknowable, or (c) a dominance argument that makes cooperation always dominant regardless of horizon.

properties.name: Structural Resistance to Totalitarianism
properties.description: The system contains an axiom or derived principle that makes unlimited concentration of coercive power structurally impermissible.
properties.operationalization: There exists a theorem T in the system such that T = 'no entity may hold monopoly coercive power over all persons.'

properties.name: Agreement-Admissibility
properties.description: The core principles of the system can, in principle, be accepted by any rational agent regardless of prior commitments, without being imposed by force.
properties.operationalization: The system's foundational axiom does not require belief in a particular historical claim, ethnic identity, or coercive imposition to be accepted.

properties.name: Accountability Mechanism
properties.description: The system provides a mechanism for holding agents accountable for violations of liberty that does not itself violate liberty.
properties.operationalization: The system has a theorem deriving accountability without state monopoly on coercive enforcement.

properties.name: Supports AI Value Alignment
properties.description: The system provides formal criteria sufficient to evaluate whether an AI system's objectives are aligned with human liberty.
properties.operationalization: The system's axioms can be expressed as evaluable constraints on an AI objective function.

properties.name: Axiom Minimality
properties.description: The system's axiom set is irreducible: no axiom is derivable from the others.
properties.operationalization: No axiom A_i can be proven from {A_1,...,A_{i-1},A_{i+1},...,A_n}.

note: All properties derived from the theory's own axioms and kernel claims. No external requirements imported.
